Get the shortest driving distance between New York, USA and Miami, USA.

How many teaspoons are in 2 tablespoons for measurement in my recipe?
Calculate the probability of observing 60 heads if I flip a coin 100 times with probability of heads 0.5.
Find me the most recent art sculpture by James Plensa with detailed description.
